plyra-memory · schema.py
Pydantic Schema Reference
Every data shape in plyra-memory · single source of truth · no untyped dicts cross a layer boundary
01 — Core Data Models
SessionMutable · Base
A bounded interaction context. Working memory is session-scoped. Auto-created on Memory() init. Flushed on end().
FieldTypeReqNotes
idstroptUUID4 hex, auto-generated
agent_idstrreqIdentifier of the owning agent
user_idstr | NoneoptEnd-user ID if applicable
created_atdatetimeoptUTC, auto-set
ended_atdatetime | NoneoptSet by session.end()
frameworkstr | Noneoptlanggraph | autogen | crewai | langchain | openai | python
metadatadictoptArbitrary key-value bag
is_activeboolcompComputed: ended_at is None
WorkingEntryMutable · Working Layer
One item in the agent's immediate awareness. Session-scoped, size-bounded. Evicted by importance (lowest first) when at capacity.
FieldTypeReqNotes
idstroptUUID4 hex, auto-generated
session_idstrreqParent Session.id
contentstrreq1–8,000 chars. Auto-stripped.
importancefloatopt0.0–1.0, default 0.5. Drives eviction order.
sourcestr | Noneopttool_output | user_message | agent_thought | injection
created_atdatetimeoptUTC, auto-set
metadatadictoptArbitrary key-value bag
importance_levelImportanceLevelcompCRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / NOISE
EpisodeImmutable · Episodic Layer · frozen=True
Single immutable event in the episodic log — the ship's log. Append-only, never edited. tool_name is required for TOOL_* events. Auto-promoted to Fact when access_count ≥ config.promotion_threshold.
FieldTypeReqNotes
idstroptUUID4 hex, auto-generated
session_idstrreqParent Session.id
agent_idstrreqAgent that created this event
eventEpisodeEventreqStandardised event type enum
contentstrreq1–32,000 chars. Free-text description of what happened.
tool_namestr | NonecondRequired when event is TOOL_CALL / TOOL_RESULT / TOOL_ERROR
tool_inputdict | NoneoptSerialized tool input arguments
tool_outputstr | NoneoptSerialized tool result
tool_errorstr | NoneoptError message if tool failed
importancefloatopt0.0–1.0, default from config.episodic_default_importance
access_countintoptIncremented on every recall hit. Drives promotion.
sequence_numintoptMonotonic counter within session. Preserves ordering.
promotedbooloptTrue once promoted to semantic memory
promoted_tostr | NoneoptFact.id that was created from this episode
created_atdatetimeoptUTC, auto-set. Immutable after creation.
importance_levelImportanceLevelcompDerived from importance float
is_tool_eventboolcompTrue for TOOL_CALL | TOOL_RESULT | TOOL_ERROR
FactMutable · Semantic Layer
Discrete durable knowledge as a subject → predicate → object triple. Deduplicated on (agent_id, subject_lower, predicate) fingerprint. Decay score computed at read-time via exponential decay — never stored.
FieldTypeReqNotes
idstroptUUID4 hex, auto-generated
agent_idstrreqOwning agent
user_idstr | NoneoptScopes fact to a specific user
subjectstrreq1–500 chars. e.g. "user", "project", "system"
predicateFactRelationreqRelation type from FactRelation enum
objectstrreq1–2,000 chars. The fact value.
contentstroptAuto-built: "{subject} {predicate} {object}". Used for embedding.
confidencefloatopt0.0–1.0, default 0.8. Updated on re-confirmation.
importancefloatopt0.0–1.0, default 0.5
access_countintoptIncremented on every recall hit
last_accesseddatetimeoptUpdated on access — drives decay computation
last_confirmeddatetimeoptUpdated when fact is reconfirmed by agent
ttl_daysint | NoneoptNone = never expires. Set for transient facts.
source_episode_idstr | NoneoptWhich Episode triggered this fact
fingerprintstrcompSHA256[:16] of (agent_id:subject_lower:predicate) — dedup key
decay_scorefloatcompconfidence × e^(−λ × days_since_access). Never stored.
is_expiredboolcompTrue if ttl_days is set and exceeded
importance_levelImportanceLevelcompDerived from importance float
02 — Retrieval Models
RecallRequestInput · memory.recall()
Fusion weights must sum to 1.0 — validated by model_validator. Searches all three layers by default.
FieldTypeReqNotes
querystrreqNatural language query for retrieval
session_idstr | NoneoptScopes working + episodic results
agent_idstr | NoneoptScopes all results to agent
layerslist[MemoryLayer]optDefault: all three layers
top_kintopt1–100, default 10
similarity_weightfloatoptDefault 0.5 — vector similarity contribution
recency_weightfloatoptDefault 0.3 — recency contribution
importance_weightfloatoptDefault 0.2 — importance contribution
min_scorefloatoptFilter: minimum fused score to include in results
RecallResultOutput · Immutable
Full response from recall(). Computed fields split results by layer for easy access. cache_hit indicates semantic cache was used.
FieldTypeReqNotes
querystrreqOriginal query for reference
resultslist[RankedMemory]reqFused, sorted by score descending
total_foundintreqTotal before top_k truncation
layers_searchedlist[MemoryLayer]reqWhich layers were queried
cache_hitbooloptTrue if semantic cache served this result
latency_msfloatoptTotal retrieval time
working_resultslist[RankedMemory]compFilter: only WORKING layer results
episodic_resultslist[RankedMemory]compFilter: only EPISODIC layer results
semantic_resultslist[RankedMemory]compFilter: only SEMANTIC layer results
RankedMemoryImmutable · Single Result Item
One memory item from any layer, with its fused rank score broken out into component scores for debugging and tuning.
FieldTypeReqNotes
idstrreqRankedMemory record ID
layerMemoryLayerreqWhich layer this came from
contentstrreqThe memory content for injection
scorefloatreq0.0–1.0 fused rank score
similarityfloatoptRaw vector cosine similarity
recencyfloatoptNormalised recency score
importancefloatoptRaw importance value from source model
source_idstrreqWorkingEntry.id | Episode.id | Fact.id
created_atdatetimereqOriginal creation time of source record
ContextRequest / ContextResultmemory.context_for()
The highest-level API. context_for() runs recall(), ranks, truncates to token_budget, and returns a prompt-ready string. budget_used_pct helps adapters decide if budget was sufficient.
FieldTypeReqNotes
querystrreqNatural language query
token_budgetintopt64–32,000. Default from config.
layerslist[MemoryLayer]optWhich layers to search
formatLiteral[...]optstring | messages | dict
— result —
contentstrreqPrompt-ready, within token_budget
token_countintreqEstimated tokens used
memories_usedintreqHow many RankedMemory items contributed
budget_used_pctfloatcomptoken_count / token_budget × 100
cache_hitbooloptSemantic cache served this result
03 — Enums
MemoryLayer
Which cognitive layer
WORKINGsession-scoped, ephemeral
EPISODICappend-only event log
SEMANTICdurable fact store
ImportanceLevel
Derived from importance float
CRITICAL0.9 – 1.0
HIGH0.7 – 0.9
MEDIUM0.4 – 0.7
LOW0.1 – 0.4
NOISE0.0 – 0.1 · evicted first
EpisodeEvent
Standardised event vocabulary
TOOL_CALLagent invoked a tool
TOOL_RESULTtool returned successfully
TOOL_ERRORtool failed
USER_MESSAGEuser sent a message
AGENT_RESPONSEagent responded
PLAN_CREATEDagent made a plan
PLAN_STEPplan step executed
SESSION_START/ENDsession lifecycle
MEMORY_PROMOTEDlayer promotion event
POLICY_BLOCKplyra-guard blocked op
CUSTOMescape hatch
FactRelation
Subject → Predicate → Object
PREFERS / DISLIKESpreferences
IS / HASidentity / possession
KNOWS / USESknowledge / tools
WORKS_ONcurrent focus
LOCATED_INgeography / context
BELONGS_TOmembership
RELATED_TOgeneral relation
LEARNED_FROMprovenance
CUSTOMescape hatch
PlyraEnv
PLYRA_ENV values
localin-process + SQLite + Chroma
disame as local, CI-friendly
stagingTCP server + Postgres + Chroma
preprodTCP/gRPC + managed Postgres
productiongRPC sidecar + Pinecone
MemoryOpType
STM server wire operations
working.add/get/clearworking layer ops
episodic.record/queryepisodic log ops
semantic.learn/forget/queryfact store ops
recallhybrid search
context_forprompt injection
session.flushworking → episodic
health.pinghealthcheck
04 — Memory Lifecycle & Decay Formula
Memory Promotion LifecycleAuto-consolidation mechanic
No existing memory system implements this. Episodic events auto-promote to durable semantic facts when retrieved frequently enough.
1
Agent acts
Tool call, user message, or thought is created. Written as WorkingEntry with session_id.
→
2
Session ends
session.flush() moves all WorkingEntry items into the EpisodicLayer as Episode records. Working memory cleared.
3
Recall increments access_count
Every time recall() returns an Episode, its access_count is incremented atomically in storage.
→
4
Promotion triggered
When access_count ≥ config.promotion_threshold (default 3), ConsolidationEngine creates a Fact from the Episode content and marks promoted=True.
Fact Decay ModelComputed at read time · never stored
Decay is computed on every read, not persisted. This means no background jobs, no stale values, and zero storage overhead. Decay never fully destroys a fact — floor is 0.01.
decay_score = confidence × e−λ · days_since_access

λ = 0.05 (config.semantic_decay_lambda)
→ half-life ≈ 14 days at default λ
→ clamped to [0.01, 1.0]
→ facts never fully disappear
↺
Re-accessing resets the clock
Every recall() hit updates last_accessed. A frequently-accessed fact never decays. An ignored fact slowly becomes irrelevant — but retrievable if needed.
05 — MemoryConfig Key Fields (PLYRA_ env vars)
MemoryConfigpydantic-settings · PLYRA_ prefix · .env file
Auto-populated from environment variables. Zero-config defaults work for local/DI with no env vars set. transport computed_field derives InProcess/TCP/gRPC from server_url.
Env VarFieldDefaultNotes
PLYRA_ENVenv: PlyraEnvlocalDrives transport + backend defaults
PLYRA_SERVER_URLserver_url: str | NoneNone (in-process)tcp://host:7700 or grpc://host:7701
PLYRA_STORE_URLstore_url: str~/.plyra/memory.dbSQLite path or postgresql://...
PLYRA_VECTORS_URLvectors_url: str~/.plyra/memory.indexChroma dir or http://chroma:8000
PLYRA_EMBEDDERembedder: EmbedderTypesentence-transformersor openai
PLYRA_OPENAI_API_KEYopenai_api_key: str | NoneNoneRequired if embedder=openai
PLYRA_PINECONE_API_KEYpinecone_api_key: str | NoneNoneRequired if vectors_backend=pinecone
PLYRA_PINECONE_INDEXpinecone_index: str | NoneNoneRequired if vectors_backend=pinecone
(no env var needed)working_max_entries: int50Max items before eviction
(no env var needed)promotion_threshold: int3access_count before episodic → semantic
(no env var needed)semantic_decay_lambda: float0.05Decay rate · half-life ≈ 14 days
(no env var needed)cache_similarity_threshold0.92Cosine sim for semantic cache hit
(no env var needed)default_token_budget: int2048context_for() default token cap
(no env var needed)transport: TransportTypecompDerived from server_url: IN_PROCESS | TCP | GRPC
req — required field
opt — optional, has default
comp — computed_field, never stored
cond — conditionally required (model_validator)
plyra-memory · schema.py · Apache 2.0 plyraai.github.io · @plyraAI
